accent.name: Thames Blue
accent.usage: Interactive elements, LDN badge, stamp seal

tri_color_bar.description: 3px horizontal stripe — Red | Gold | Blue. Used at page top, between sections, above footer.

stamp_seal.description: Double-circle passport stamp with 'YALLA LONDON' outer ring, 'LDN' center, 'GATE Y · 1st CLASS' bottom. Cardinal dots at 9/12/3 o'clock in red/gold/blue.
stamp_seal.usage: PDF covers, Etsy products, footer decoration, hero watermark

gold_rule.description: 2px gold (#C49A2A) horizontal line, typically 40-60px wide. Placed below logos, above article content, between heading and body.

boarding_pass_meta.description: Three-column metadata row: GATE Y | CLASS 1st | TO LONDON. Used in PDF covers and Etsy product covers.

kicker_label.description: Gold (#C49A2A) uppercase mono text above headings. 10px, bold, tracking 0.25em.

watermark.description: Faded brand stamp at 2-8% opacity, rotated 8-12deg, used as background decoration.

templates.name: Boarding Pass
templates.description: Cream background, boarding pass border with perforated tear line, YALLA wordmark + LDN badge top-left, boarding pass metadata, large serif title center, stamp seal in right stub

templates.name: Red & Gold Editorial
templates.description: Red-to-dark gradient, gold accent lines, YALLA wordmark, large white serif title, boarding pass metadata, tricolor bar

templates.name: Cream Stamp
templates.description: Cream background, double border frame, centered layout, YALLA wordmark, destination in red, large serif title, stamp seal below

templates.name: Thames Blue
templates.description: Deep blue gradient, faded LONDON watermark, gold stamp seal top-right, gold kicker + gold accent line, white serif title, boarding pass metadata

templates.name: Magazine Split
templates.description: 62/38 split — dark charcoal left panel with content, red-to-gold gradient right panel with large stamp seal

templates.name: Charcoal Luxury
templates.description: Dark charcoal background, gold border frame, centered YALLA wordmark + stamp seal + serif title, boarding pass metadata at bottom

etsy_listing.description: Tricolor bar top+bottom, YALLA wordmark + LDN badge top-left, gold accent line, boarding pass metadata, gold kicker label, large left-aligned serif title, stamp seal bottom-right

social_post_square.description: Dark navy background, tricolor bar at top, YALLA wordmark centered, gold rule, content area, stamp seal watermark at 5% opacity

social_post_story.description: Full-bleed hero image with dark gradient overlay, tricolor bar at top, YALLA wordmark, gold kicker, large serif title, CTA button in London Red

email_header.description: Navy background, tricolor bar at top, YALLA wordmark + LDN badge centered, gold accent line below

design_rules.spacing: 8px base grid. Component padding: 16px. Between components: 24px. Between sections: 48-64px.
design_rules.transitions: All interactive: 300ms ease. Hover lifts: -translate-y-1. Active press: scale(0.97).
never: Never use letter-spacing on Arabic text
Never use font-weight below 400 for Arabic
Never hardcode hex colors — use CSS variables or brand-kit tokens
Never use bg-white — use var(--admin-card-bg) or bg-yl-cream
Never skip the tri-color bar between major page sections
